search_space.memory_traffic_mechanism: load each packed Q4_K quant uint32 once per four nibbles and make the packed-word lane explicit
search_space.note: 32B is excluded unless the 8B/14B semantic codegen v3 gate accepts.
search_space.scope: single exact-tensor Q4_K ffn_gate packed-load runtime probes
